content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Starter Kits to Solve Collaboration
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with silos. Learn how to use a SaaS starter kit with Antigravity and Claude Code to streamline client delivery and ship faster than ever.
content.answer_block: Collaboration bottlenecks vanish when you standardize your stack. By deploying a battle-tested SaaS starter kit, you unify your architecture, automate environment parity, and enable seamless multi-developer workflows. Using Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for intelligent, context-aware development, you can cut delivery time by 60% while maintaining enterprise-grade code quality.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and your codebase has become a walled garden. You’re trapped in a silo, unable to pull in collaborators without weeks of onboarding friction. This isn't just a technical debt issue; it is a business bottleneck that kills your velocity and your reputation as a high-end freelancer.

But what if you could package your entire engineering philosophy into a deployable asset? By moving to a standardized SaaS starter kit, you turn your project architecture into a repeatable product. It is time to stop reinventing the wheel and start shipping scalable, collaborative infrastructure that scales with your business.

steps.title: Standardize the Repository Architecture
steps.description: Establish a modular structure that separates business logic from infrastructure, allowing teammates to work on specific domains without conflicts.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular SaaS boilerplate structure using Next.js, TypeScript, and Prisma. Ensure the folder structure isolates features, hooks, and API routes to facilitate independent development.

steps.title: Inject Collaborative Middleware
steps.description: Implement shared authentication and RBAC early to ensure all collaborators have secure, role-based access to the build process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure NextAuth.js with role-based access control. Create a middleware.ts file that enforces protected routes for developers and admins.

steps.title: Automate Environment Parity
steps.description: Use containerized environments to ensure that what works on your machine works on every collaborator's machine.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust Docker Compose file that includes PostgreSQL, Redis, and the Next.js app, ensuring parity between local and staging environments.

steps.title: Enforce Code Quality with AI
steps.description: Use automated linting and pre-commit hooks to ensure collaborative code remains clean and maintainable without manual code reviews.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Setup Husky, lint-staged, and ESLint with strict TypeScript rules. Configure an automated pre-commit hook that runs Claude Code to check for architectural regressions.

steps.title: Sync Project Context for Claude
steps.description: Generate a comprehensive .claudeignore and project manifest so your AI assistant understands the codebase architecture perfectly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this codebase and generate a comprehensive 'context.md' file that outlines the folder structure, API contracts, and development patterns for future AI assistance.

pro_tips: Always use a 'feature-first' folder structure to prevent merge conflicts in the shared routes/pages directories.
Implement a 'dev-container' in VS Code to force every contributor onto the exact same Node.js and OS version.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests for new features automatically before pushing to the main branch.
Keep your database schema in a centralized 'types' directory to act as a single source of truth for front-end and back-end.
Automate your documentation by using Claude Code to parse your PRs into a living changelog file.
content.next_steps: After standardizing your kit, deploy it to a private GitHub template repository and start your next client project by cloning your own 'Source of Truth'.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the process and start building the future. Our community of high-velocity builders is waiting to help you scale your freelance business. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
